title: I had a procedure the other day of an exciting new technology for my lung cancer
body:
Breaking from my reddit protest to update you all.

I had an exciting new treatment done for my lung cancer the other day.  It's the [Aliya System,](https://galvanizetx.com/aliya-system/) which is sort of like an electro pulse given into the tumor via a needle.  It then kills the tumor off, while hopefully destroying it in a way to send antibodies for the rest of my body's cancer cells.  The tumor is broken apart and then my immune system attacks it, learning to attack the rest of the cancer, too.

It seems to have worked!  My doctor said that the tumor they attacked broke apart.  I'm having it again in two weeks on another spot that seems to be growing, then I'll get scanned.  Very hopeful about what's to come.
